query:
SELECT bookTitle, LEFT(s3CoverUrl, 50) as s3, authorName 
FROM book_profiles 
WHERE bookTitle LIKE '%Think%' OR bookTitle LIKE '%Dare%' OR bookTitle LIKE '%Brene%' OR bookTitle LIKE '%Adam Grant%'
ORDER BY bookTitle;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 46FBtXPMNF6LwZ8.root --database ehSrGoKN2NYhXg8UYLtWGw --execute SELECT bookTitle, LEFT(s3CoverUrl, 50) as s3, authorName 
FROM book_profiles 
WHERE bookTitle LIKE '%Think%' OR bookTitle LIKE '%Dare%' OR bookTitle LIKE '%Brene%' OR bookTitle LIKE '%Adam Grant%'
ORDER BY bookTitle;
